replies.msg: 所以我依加俾心機溫緊書

1.) Encapsulation: use private for field variables, in this case name, amount and type
2.) getter and setter
1.) In copy constructor, use getter to retrieve variable
2.) Create setter for name and type
3.) Indentation consistency: Either used k&r or allman for all indentation. Most of us use k&r in industries anyway
